g.text: Read CR spec, status OCID, and delete intent
Get the OCI resource by known identifier
Resolve an existing OCI resource by display name
Persist the resolved or created OCID back into status
- Supported drift splits into immutable-reject, horizontal
resize, vertical resize, and general update branches.
Submit OCI delete for Open Search Cluster
Confirm deletion with GetOpenSearchCluster until the resource is DELETED or not found.
Remove the finalizer after OCI deletion is confirmed
Request requeue and keep the finalizer
Return an unsuccessful terminal reconcile result
Compare live OCI state with the supported drift surface
Reject the change before any OCI mutation
Classify supported drift into horizontal resize, vertical resize, or general update
Validate immutable networking and host-shape fields before any resize or general update.
Keep the retained OCID authoritative across resize and general update branches.
Apply only the supported in-place update surface
Return success for the usable active state
